scoreboard.item: platform.ts + glyph sweep + Windows homescreen CmdK
scoreboard.evidence: platform.ts (src/lib/platform.ts:1-44) consumed across 9 files and homescreen kbd fixed (IdleControlCenter.tsx:356), but TerminalComposer.tsx:1164 still ships literal 'dictate (⌘J)' and ${MOD}${MOD} renders 'CtrlCtrl' (App.tsx:2216/2258, appCommands.ts:217).

scoreboard.item: Single-source identity (displayName/monogram, kill faeez/firaz/adletic chrome)
scoreboard.evidence: settings.ts:85,178-186 single source; greeting (IdleControlCenter.tsx:247-260), AccountMenu (60-72,113,131-132), Settings name field all subscribe; residual 'firaz' lives only in moneyAgents/OracleRoster surfaces tracked as separate defects.

scoreboard.item: Flip provider base off codex + delete downgrade migration
scoreboard.evidence: Migration deleted (settings.ts:138-140); base selectors at chat.ts:256-290; ChatPane boots baseModelId (ChatPane.tsx:810-812); boot self-heal at App.tsx:671-685; agents boot via agentChatModelId (App.tsx:394-397). Residual defaultAi drift is a tracked defect.

scoreboard.item: Fluidity baseline: boot-apply appearance + motion tokens
scoreboard.evidence: applyAppearance at boot (App.tsx:661) and motion tokens consumed, but density and --app-font-scale have ZERO consumers anywhere in src and xterm hardcodes fontSize:13 (TerminalRuntime.tsx:180) — only the reduce-motion third does anything (verified).

scoreboard.item: Default flashLevel to calm (new + existing users)
scoreboard.evidence: DEFAULT_SETTINGS.flashLevel:'calm' (settings.ts:95) applied at boot, but no migration exists — installs that ever saved under the old lush default reload flashLevel:'lush' verbatim (settings.ts:126-168).

scoreboard.item: Chat empty-state engine-aware copy + placeholder submit/discovery cue
scoreboard.evidence: Engine label (ChatPane.tsx:3628) and '/ for commands, @ for files' placeholder (3261) landed; the ⏎ send / ⇧⏎ newline / ⏎ queue submit cue never did, and hero (model.engine) vs docked (usageLabel) disagree for spark.

scoreboard.item: Swap native window.prompt for themed /goal + platform-correct path placeholder
scoreboard.evidence: GoalEditorOverlay (ChatPane.tsx:4753-4812) wired in both empty/docked branches; zero window.prompt calls remain in src; Settings.tsx:914 isApple-aware path example.

scoreboard.item: Tokenize strays: #a855f7 sparkle, frozen .hero-title/.helper-line, text-white CTAs
scoreboard.evidence: --color-spark token done (App.css:66, ChatPane.tsx:3364/3384) and .hero-title adopted by Onboarding, but the chat hero itself still hardcodes the frozen values (ChatPane.tsx:3618,3627), 8+ text-white/text-black CTAs persist, and raw #a855f7 remains in .osai-ultra (App.css:526-538).

scoreboard.item: Accent discipline on resting context chips
scoreboard.evidence: Six core chips demoted to muted (ChatPane.tsx:2837-2849); the run-event Waypoints pill (2876) and attached-memories pill (2881-2882) the plan explicitly named still wear resting accent.

scoreboard.item: Splash respects splashOnLaunch + fade exit
scoreboard.evidence: Gated at mount (App.tsx:410 loadSettings().splashOnLaunch); two-phase token-driven fade (App.tsx:635-643, 4182-4196). Minor: under reduce-motion the invisible splash blocks input ~300ms (low).

scoreboard.item: Delete dead bento CSS + dead hotkeys field + reportUsage telemetry loop
scoreboard.evidence: All three still ship: .osai-tile/.osai-omni/osai-idle-glow (App.css:390-488, zero references), commands.ts hotkeys declared/set but never read, diag.ts:163-182 reportUsage still a write-only loop fired from App.tsx:762 and CommandPalette.tsx:40.

scoreboard.item: Accent discipline: strip generic border-hovers on the four superapp panes
scoreboard.evidence: Every plan-cited hover:border-[var(--color-accent)]/50 is present verbatim: AppCastPane.tsx:330/400/493, AppAttachPane.tsx:109, AttachAppsPane.tsx:132, MirrorViewer.tsx:222.

scoreboard.item: Motion-token layer in App.css @theme (§2.1)
scoreboard.evidence: App.css:118-131 — all five durations + four easings with exact §2.1 values; only optional composite shorthands omitted.

scoreboard.item: Global transition baseline + single reduce-motion guard (§2.2)
scoreboard.evidence: Baseline App.css:236-244; master guard App.css:552-559 + OS mirror 560-567, boot-applied via App.tsx:661. Caveat tracked as defect: the unlayered baseline silently overrides Tailwind transition utilities.

scoreboard.item: Opt-in motion utilities (§2.3)
scoreboard.evidence: All six utilities exist verbatim (App.css:261-299: .lift/.press/.btn-glow/.fade-in-up/.scale-in/.stagger); adoption is near-zero (.lift/.scale-in/.stagger have no call sites) — tracked under the P2 choreography item.

scoreboard.item: detect_providers + GUI-PATH-aware resolvers + onboarding engine step
scoreboard.evidence: Rust command chat.rs:403-409 with install-dir resolvers + Windows .exe/.cmd scan; providerDetect.ts wrapper with cache; onboarding live status dots + no-CLI state; ChatPane grays unavailable engines; App self-heal consumes it. (HOME-vs-USERPROFILE resolver gap tracked as defect.)

scoreboard.item: Base sweep: budget copy, spark seed, codex-everywhere
scoreboard.evidence: Engine-neutral budget copy (ChatPane.tsx:284) and agents on agentChatModelId landed; App.tsx:1389 + apps.ts:68 still hardcode 'codex --model gpt-5.3-codex-spark --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox', moneyAgents AGENT_CHAT_MODEL feeds seed text, and bundleBoundaries.test.ts:300 pins the stale literal.

scoreboard.item: Onboarding: flags/back-fill, live handshake, reusable controls + MCP review, skippable, real first chat
scoreboard.evidence: ~70% landed (flags, veteran back-fill, replay entry, detect_providers wiring, MCP step with dots, calm skip); never landed: lifting Settings controls (re-implemented instead), shared McpChips (PluginsPane untouched), and the first-chat handoff (finish() just closes, Onboarding.tsx:78-88).

scoreboard.item: Homescreen decision: day-aware greeting, .surface-pop command line w/ provider hint, focus rings, glance skeletons, resume-last, stop seeding stranger fleet
scoreboard.evidence: Done: focus-visible rings, resume-last, chord labels, empty default fleet. Open: command line still shadow-2xl with no provider hint and never receives focus (IdleControlCenter.tsx:308,331,343), home glance ignores the loaded skeleton flag (129,178), greeting has no day data, seeded chat still titled 'jarvis' (App.tsx:1969).

scoreboard.item: Shell focus + drag: focused-pane indicator, token chrome strip, real AccountMenu, drag-to-cell, discoverable Mission Control
scoreboard.evidence: All five in code: accent focus border (App.tsx:3942-3947), --osai-h-chrome strip (3951), settings-driven AccountMenu, pointer drag-to-swap (500-550, 3952-3957), MC disabled-at-zero + 'N panes' pill (2249-2255, 3716-3726). New drag defects over browser panes tracked separately.

scoreboard.item: Palette/discovery: platform labels, ARIA + focus trap, live MRU, no-dead-end no-results, backtracking matcher
scoreboard.evidence: Labels, MRU 'recent' group, AI-intent escape hatch, DP matcher, and full ARIA on CommandPalette all real; focus trap absent on all three overlays, FileFinder/GlobalSearch have zero ARIA, matcher lacks the plan-prescribed cost cap, MRU can be one-run stale.

scoreboard.item: Chat safety + affordances: failure distinction, approval un-truncate, regenerate fix, edit-and-resend, copy buttons, timestamps
scoreboard.evidence: Approval fullArgs+copy, last-turn regenerate gating, edit-and-resend, copy set, user timestamps landed; failure distinction is void for codex/opencode (no is_error on synthesized results), claude error text read from wrong field, retry/regenerate no-op after startup failure/resume, assistant timestamps and Write/Diff copy missing.

scoreboard.item: Design-system convergence sweep: secondary panes onto .pane-header/.surface-pop/tokens + lint guard
scoreboard.evidence: CSS primitives all landed (.pane-header, .pill, .surface-pop, .focus-accent, --osai-shadow-pop in App.css) but ZERO panes adopted them — 7+ hand-rolled headers at divergent heights, 55 hex/text-white/bg-black literals across 18 files, PaneEmpty/Skeleton/CopyButton/toast/uiHooks don't exist, no lint guard.

scoreboard.item: Superapp-pane polish: Windows-gate cast/attach, native-layer fade-in, live mirroring indicator, .surface-pop menus, transitioned polls
scoreboard.evidence: Byte-for-byte where the plan left it: no OS gating (apps.ts:73-76), raw Rust/OS errors rendered on Windows, static danger-dot mirror indicator (AppCastPane.tsx:534), shadow-2xl menus, full-array poll swaps with no animation.

scoreboard.item: Interactive surfaces: terminalFontSize wiring, token-driven xterm/Monaco themes, voice waveform, pet status, skeletons, wave dedupe
scoreboard.evidence: Only the reduce-motion gating sub-part landed (App.css:552-567 + boot apply). Open: xterm/Monaco hardcode fontSize:13 and frozen hex themes, VoiceButton still animate-ping dot, PetPane debug spec dump (PetPane.tsx:277), bare-spinner loading states, osai-wave duplicated inline in two components.

scoreboard.item: Full motion choreography
scoreboard.evidence: Splash fade, streaming caret, clock-colon blink, onboarding/MC entrances shipped; ~90% unwired — no hero bloom, no transcript/pane/modal/toast enter-exit, hard autoscroll, maximize teleports, §2.4 support classes (.overlay-backdrop/.toast-in/out/.disclose/.skeleton) never authored, hardcoded duration literals never retuned.

scoreboard.item: Hero starter deck (starter-prompt chips / resume rail on the empty chat)
scoreboard.evidence: Nothing landed — empty hero is still headline → composer → helper only (ChatPane.tsx:3617-3637); attach/dictate/resume stay buried in the unlabeled Wrench menu.

defects.title: Every user-created money agent is rooted at /Users/firazfhansurie with macOS log paths
defects.detail: CONFIRMED by two independent verifiers. const home="/Users/firazfhansurie" feeds createMoneyAgent (187-191) and loadCustomMoneyAgents defaults (128-132): every new agent gets statePath/queuePath under a nonexistent macOS tree, stdout/stderr under macOS-only ~/Library/Logs, and the chat seed instructs the model to inspect those paths (272-274). On Windows readJson/tailText fail silently (379-386, 401-408) so health is perpetually 'unknown' and log tails empty — the monitoring loop is dead for every created agent. Fix: resolve home via the home_dir Tauri command (pattern at dashboard.ts:33) with platform separators + platform log dirs. (Verifier correction: agent chat panes do NOT inherit the invalid cwd — PaneCard falls back to runtime homeDir — but the agent.cwd is still leaked as seed text.)

defects.title: Any agent whose id normalizes to 'firaz' is force-reported as running with a stranger's job copy
defects.detail: CONFIRMED; the plan's critical §6 item, untouched. summarizeMoneyAgentState special-cases agent.id==='firaz': health 'unknown'→'running' plus fabricated currentJob 'personal goals and shell control' and nextAction 'open the existing firaz chatpane agent' (334-345) even with no state file. normalizeAgentId lowercases/strips 'osai-' (104-112), so a user-created 'Firaz' collides; the fake green agent is counted active in the home StatusFooter (IdleControlCenter.tsx:116-118, 536). Gate behind actual state-file existence and neutralize the firaz-addressed role/guardrail copy (240-261).

defects.title: Settings 'text size' and 'density' controls are complete no-ops disguised as live by the preview
defects.detail: CONFIRMED by three audits. applyFontScale writes --app-font-scale and applyDensity sets data-density, but grep across all src/CSS finds ZERO consumers of either; xterm hardcodes fontSize:13 (TerminalRuntime.tsx:180), Monaco hardcodes fontSize:13 (EditorPane.tsx:114), and neither imports settings. Settings.tsx:1222/1250 promise 'scales the cockpit' / 'how tight the cockpit packs', and the in-panel AppearancePreview reacts, making the dead controls look live. PLAN-uiux-polish.md even marks density as completed. Fix: add [data-density='compact'] rules + var(--app-font-scale) consumers in App.css; subscribe xterm (term.options.fontSize) and Monaco (updateOptions) to terminalFontSize; fold density into AppSettings.

defects.title: POSIX-only path handling breaks Windows features across six surfaces (one shared root cause)
defects.detail: CONFIRMED independently on five surfaces; merge of: (1) containingDir splits on '/' only — revealFile spawns files panes rooted at '/', finderRoot degrades to '/', pane labels show full backslash paths (App.tsx:779,996-1002,1019,1205,2591,2598); (2) FileFinder.basename '/'-only — 2x basename ranking defeated, dir column never renders, recents list permanently empty because MRU absolutes never match root+'/' (FileFinder.tsx:16-19,84-93,104-112,135-139); (3) ChatPane.baseName — activity steps/FileCards/resume picker show full C:\ paths; isPaneFileTarget rejects paths with spaces (ChatPane.tsx:345-348, paneRouting.ts:32-43,68-71); (4) FilesPane — git M/A/D/U decorations never render (mixed-separator map keys from files.rs:42,106,173-176), 'open terminal here' resolves the wrong dir, goUp/rootName broken (FilesPane.tsx:200,232,266); (5) BrowserPane — file-drop builds invalid file://C:%5C URLs, 'open folder in files pane' roots at the FILE path (BrowserPane.tsx:601-609,772-776); (6) TerminalComposer baseName + POSIX quotePath invalid for PowerShell (TerminalComposer.tsx:86-88,109-113). Fix: one separator-agnostic basename/dirname/normalize helper (chatPaneState.ts:81-84 already does it right) + normalize backend-emitted paths in files.rs.

defects.title: FileFinder, GlobalSearch, and the busy-chat close prompt are occluded by native browser webviews
defects.detail: CONFIRMED. overlayOpen includes only settingsOpen||paletteOpen||pinSiteSpace||overviewOpen; fileFinderOpen, globalSearchOpen, and closePrompt are missing. Native browser webviews composite above all HTML (BrowserPane.tsx:302-316), so with a visible browser pane Ctrl+P/Ctrl+Shift+F open an invisible z-50 modal that steals keyboard focus, and the busy-chat confirm dialog hides behind the page. One-line fix: add the three flags (plus splash/onboardingOpen for completeness) to overlayOpen.

defects.title: Browser address-bar autocomplete renders behind the native webview — invisible while a page is showing
defects.detail: CONFIRMED. overlayMenuOpen covers bookmarks/downloads/profile/options/send but omits suggestOpen, so the history-suggestions dropdown (1189-1235, absolute over the slot) opens while the webview is still composited on top — typing in the address bar produces an autocomplete the user cannot see (only blind ArrowDown+Enter works). Add suggestOpen to overlayMenuOpen at line 308-309.

defects.title: Cast & Attach panes fully reachable on Windows; both dead-end in raw Rust/OS errors under macOS-only copy
defects.detail: CONFIRMED. Catalog/palette expose 'apps' and 'app cast' with no OS gate (apps.ts:73-76, appCommands.ts:68-79). AppCastPane renders the raw Rust reject 'app-cast is macOS-only' (appcast.rs:936) under 'couldn't mirror window' with a futile accent retry (AppCastPane.tsx:498-513); AttachAppsPane's ungated mac_list_apps spawns /usr/bin/osascript (mac_apps.rs:22-27,62-69), rendering the raw io error in a danger box re-fired every 10s (AttachAppsPane.tsx:35-39,74-78). Gate both entries behind isApple (platform.ts:21) or render an honest 'not available on Windows yet' empty state.

defects.title: Windows terminals silently drop their cwd — every shell opens in the home dir
defects.detail: CONFIRMED. The frontend always passes cwd (pty.ts:84-93, TerminalRuntime.tsx:437-439) but the Windows pty_spawn_terminal signature has no cwd parameter (Tauri ignores the extra arg) and unconditionally cwd's to USERPROFILE (pty.rs:280-282); the error fallback also passes null despite cwd in scope (TerminalRuntime.tsx:443). 'Open terminal here' and restored layouts always land in home while the composer context chip displays the directory the shell is NOT in. Add cwd: Option<String> to the Windows command + pass it in the fallback.

defects.title: Codex/opencode turn failures render as benign success footers
defects.detail: CONFIRMED end-to-end — the engine-scoped remnant of the original P1-critical defect. chat.rs synthesizes failure results with subtype 'error_during_execution' but NO is_error and no text (chat.rs:1646-1654, 1668-1682, 1923-1929, 1363-1371), while ChatPane keys ok solely off ev.is_error and runEvents.ts:242 does the same, so codex failures render as a faint 'Xs' footer and the run chip says 'completed'. Verifier addition: opencode crashes hit the run_per_turn EOF fallback which synthesizes subtype 'success' (chat.rs:1029-1039), so the backend must add is_error:true (+ the engine's message) to its synthesized failure lines — a frontend subtype check alone misses opencode.

defects.title: Empty chat hero floods with telemetry chips and a never-empty token ledger before the first keystroke
defects.detail: CONFIRMED — the plan's only critical §4 row, untouched. composerContextChips unconditionally emits engine/model/effort/permission/budget chips (chatPaneState.ts:261-265) and contextLedger always seeds a budget bucket (291-303); the composer memo renders both rows unconditionally and the hero renders {composer} verbatim (3626), so a brand-new chat shows 5-6 chips plus an 'N est tok' mono line before any input. Fix: gate both rows on !empty || hasDraft (both already in scope; add hasDraft to the memo deps).

defects.title: Enter while the session is starting destroys the hero; startup failures land as transcript turns
defects.detail: CONFIRMED including reachability (Enter calls send() unconditionally; sendContract only disables the button). sendText with null sessionIdRef appends a 'chat is still starting — queued…' result turn (2073-2090), flipping empty=false and hard-swapping the hero for a transcript containing one system footnote; real startup failures append 'failed to start: …' the same way (1612-1618). Aggravator: the queue-flush effect re-runs only on [streaming] (1689-1698), so the promised auto-send may not fire promptly. Keep empty=true pre-session and render a calm inline status/error line in the hero.

defects.title: NotesPane deletes a note from disk on a single click — no confirm, no undo, no trash
defects.detail: CONFIRMED. Trash2 → onDelete → deleteNote → delete_path → std::fs::remove_file (bypasses OS trash), errors swallowed (156-158). The 24px delete button sits adjacent to the frequently-used 'send to oracle' button. Inconsistent with the app's own two-click confirm convention (OracleRoster.tsx:497-513, 585-601). Add the same two-click-to-confirm pattern.

defects.title: Claude failure text read from the wrong field — danger card shows metadata but no error message
defects.detail: Verified, downgraded from high: the failure is still loudly signaled (danger card + retry); only the diagnostic text is lost. resultText reads ev.text but passthrough claude results carry the message in ev.result (chat.ts:164; runEvents.ts:250 reads the right field). Fix: prefer ev.result when string, at least for is_error results.

defects.title: Retry/regenerate are silent no-ops after startup failure and on resumed transcripts
defects.detail: Verified, downgraded: the common mid-session retry works; edit-and-resend remains a working recovery. (a) The 'failed to start' card's retry calls regenerate while lastSentRef and sessionIdRef are both null — dead click; startup failure needs a session re-spin (restartKey) not a resend. (b) resumeSession nulls lastSentRef (2358) while the rehydrated last user bubble still shows an enabled regenerate button. Pass the bubble's own turn.text into the handler and route startup retry to restartKey.

defects.title: Onboarding replay silently clobbers the saved engine and wipes chatModel/defaultAi
defects.detail: Verified, downgraded (replay-path only; first-run auto-pick is intended; skip persists nothing): the detection effect unconditionally setProvider(`${firstAvail.id}-cli`) despite the comment claiming a guard, so a codex/opencode veteran replaying setup gets flipped to claude-cli and finish() persists it — and finish() always writes chatModel:null + a derived defaultAi (79-86), discarding explicit picks even when nothing changed. Guard the auto-pick on chatProvider still being the untouched default ('codex-cli', settings.ts:107) / no step-2 interaction, and only null chatModel when the engine actually changed.

defects.title: Appshot is a dead chord on Windows: labeled 'CtrlCtrl', bound to Win-key double-tap, backend macOS-only
defects.detail: Verified, downgraded (toolbar buttons + palette still reach it; the backend shells /usr/sbin/screencapture+tmux, oracles.rs:352-391, so even a fixed binding only yields an error toast on Windows). The trigger is e.key==='Meta' double-tap while every label renders ${MOD}${MOD} = 'CtrlCtrl' with no separator (appCommands.ts:217, App.tsx:2216/2258, Settings.tsx:627). Either implement Ctrl-double-tap + a Windows capture backend, or gate/label honestly.

defects.title: Browser toasts/annotate badge and the AppCast mirroring indicator render under native layers
defects.detail: Verified, downgraded (feedback loss, not broken functionality — actions complete; some toasts fire while a menu still hides the webview). BrowserPane's toast + 'annotating…' pill are absolutely positioned inside the slot the webview composites over (1692-1702 vs the rule at 302-307); AppCast's trust-critical 'mirroring' badge + stop button + toast sit under the capture NSWindow ordered above the slot (AppCastPane.tsx:526-549, appcast.rs:696-714). Move feedback into React chrome (toolbar row / strip below it), never over the slot.

defects.title: Hardcoded 'codex --model gpt-5.3-codex-spark --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox' shell launcher survives the base sweep
defects.detail: Reported by two audits. sendToAi's codex route and apps.ts:68's sidebar codex app both hardcode the spark launcher with sandbox bypass regardless of saved provider/model (claude-code likewise hardcodes --dangerously-skip-permissions at 1396); bundleBoundaries.test.ts:300 pins the stale literal so the fix requires a test update. Route through baseModelId()/baseProvider().

defects.title: defaultAi drifts from chatProvider — composer model pick doesn't update it
defects.detail: The composer picker saves {chatModel, chatProvider} but not defaultAi, while settings.ts:110 persists defaultAi:'codex-code' as a second copy — 'send to AI' (App.tsx:1328) then routes a claude user into a codex shell. Also: a stale saved chatModel falls back to CHAT_MODELS[0] (gpt-5.3-codex-spark) instead of firstModelForEngine (ChatPane.tsx:812). Derive defaultAi at read time (defaultAiForProvider exists, chat.ts:285) or write it in the picker.

defects.title: Stranger-identity residue: firaz seeds, OracleRoster persona, mirror room prefix, adletic socket
defects.detail: Merged from four audits: (1) every custom agent's seed says 'do not ask firaz…' (moneyAgents.ts:279,301) and claims model gpt-5.3-codex-spark (270) when agents boot on the user's base model; (2) OracleRoster PRIMARY_ORACLE_IDENTITY='firaz' drives 'spawn your oracle (osai-firaz)' / 'firaz · offline' / delete warnings (OracleRoster.tsx:52,263,272-274,520); (3) mirror rooms are still `firaz-${token}` on a personal workers.dev endpoint (mirrorTransport.ts:56,28) — the plan claimed this was neutralized; (4) defaultSocketName defaults to 'adletic' (settings.ts:101). Route all through displayName()/settings/config.

defects.title: Windows codex/opencode home-dir installs invisible: resolvers read HOME, not USERPROFILE
defects.detail: Reported by two audits. resolve_bin (chat.rs:257) and opencode_bin (331-335) read only HOME (unset for GUI Windows processes), so ~/.local/bin, nvm-dir, and %USERPROFILE%\.opencode\bin probes never fire — detection falls back to PATH-only and an opencode installed in its default location shows 'not found' in onboarding/picker. claude_bin already does HOME.or(USERPROFILE) (192); mirror it with Windows paths/extensions.

defects.title: No focus traps or dialog semantics across the app's modals
defects.detail: Merged from four audits: Settings overlay has no role/aria-modal/label/focus management at all (1047-1054); Onboarding declares role=dialog aria-modal but moves focus only on the name step — Tab walks the occluded app on steps 0/2/3/4 (Onboarding.tsx:120, the plan's continue-button-focus spec unbuilt); CommandPalette/FileFinder/GlobalSearch have no inert/focusout guard (GlobalSearch doesn't even intercept Tab) and FileFinder/GlobalSearch have ZERO ARIA despite the palette's full pattern existing to mirror (CommandPalette.tsx:358-393); GoalEditorOverlay lacks role/aria-modal/trap (ChatPane.tsx:4770). One shared trap utility + ARIA mirror fixes all six.

defects.title: Over-broad window-level key handlers: exited-Enter restart, double Ctrl+S save conflict, composer key stealing
defects.detail: Merged class of three: (1) while a terminal is exited, a window keydown treats ANY bare Enter as restart + preventDefault — Enter in the chat composer/palette respawns the pane and can silently eat a composer send (TerminalRuntime.tsx:545-555,570-571); (2) EditorPane registers both a Monaco CtrlCmd+S command and a window keydown, so one Ctrl+S runs save() twice with the same mtimeRef — the second write trips the SaveConflictError guard (fs.ts:121-141) into a false 'file changed on disk' banner, and every open editor pane saves regardless of focus (EditorPane.tsx:169,185-194); (3) every mounted TerminalComposer installs a capture-phase window keydown using stopPropagation (not stopImmediatePropagation), so printable keys duplicate into multiple open composers (TerminalComposer.tsx:280-331). Scope all three to the focused/visible pane.

defects.title: No keyboard paste path into the raw terminal on Windows (Cmd-only bindings)
defects.detail: Verified, downgraded: xterm's native paste event means Ctrl+Shift+V and Shift+Insert DO paste text, and the composer textarea handles image paste — but Ctrl+V in the raw terminal sends a literal ^V (platform-inappropriate and undiscoverable) and keyboard image-paste is unavailable there because the custom handler binds paste/copy to metaKey only (278,284). Add an isApple-gated Ctrl+V/Ctrl+Shift+V binding via the existing platform.ts.

defects.title: Pane drag-reorder degrades over browser panes and paints the wrong affordance
defects.detail: Merged: target acquisition relies on per-pane React pointer events with no pointer capture, but native webviews are OS surfaces above the DOM — dragging over a browser pane's body never highlights it and releasing there leaves dragActiveKey/cursor:grabbing stuck until the next click (514-542); and dropTargetKey is shared with OS file-drops, so reorder-dragging onto a terminal shows the dashed 'drop to insert path' overlay while the gesture actually swaps panes (4171-4176). Fix: setPointerCapture on the strip + hit-test via paneKeyAtPoint from the registry; suppress the path overlay when dragActiveKey != null.

defects.title: Hidden 20px window-drag strip eats the top of first-row pane chrome buttons
defects.detail: With topBarMode force-hidden, the absolute z-40 h-5 drag strip overlays y 0-20 while the grid's 28px chrome strip starts at y 8 — the top ~6px of close/maximize/move on any top-row pane starts a window drag instead of clicking. The sidebar compensates with pt-8; the grid doesn't. Shrink the strip or pad the grid top when topBarHidden.

defects.title: Collapsed sidebar leaves zero chrome — no palette, bell, badge, or Mission Control entry
defects.detail: sidebarActions render only inside the aside gated on sidebarOpen; topBarMode is force-migrated to 'hidden' (settings.ts:144-145). After Ctrl+B everything is keyboard-only and unread notifications become invisible. The plan's minimal fixed-corner palette+bell cluster when !sidebarOpen was never built.

defects.title: text-white/text-black on accent/danger surfaces fail contrast under non-default accents
defects.detail: Merged from two audits: unread badges (App.tsx:2232,2274), keep-running CTA (2532), pin CTA (3450), MobileBottomNav badge text-black (2700), PaneErrorBoundary.tsx:59, BrowserPane.tsx:1675, AppCastPane.tsx:390/483/509. The runtime-computed --color-accent-fg token exists for exactly this (App.css:56). Part of the unfinished P0 tokenize item.

defects.title: Stopping an opencode run paints a contradictory red failure card with a retry button
defects.detail: stop() pushes a neutral 'stopped by user' note, then chat_stop fan_outs {result, is_error:true} (chat.rs:2434-2437) into the still-attached channel — handleEvent renders a second danger card + retry for an intentional user action. Suppress the synthetic stop result via a stopping flag (or skip the fan_out on user-initiated kills).

defects.title: Composer Wrench/model dropdowns: no outside-click/Escape close, unlabeled trigger, inert chips
defects.detail: Merged: Dropdown has no backdrop, no document pointerdown listener, no Escape — the menu stays pinned while typing (5173-5211); the Wrench trigger hiding ALL real controls (resume/attach/dictate/permission/budget/effort) is a bare icon with no title/aria-label/aria-expanded (3284-3289 vs Dropdown's button 5191-5200); and the six context chips render as pills with no onClick while their controls hide in that menu.

defects.title: Windows never finds ripgrep — global search always full-reads every file with no backend cancellation
defects.detail: ripgrep_bin() probes only macOS/Linux paths, so every GlobalSearch keystroke (post-180ms debounce) triggers search_with_ignore, which std::fs::read()s every file under the root (1347-1350); the frontend 'alive' flag only discards results, so rapid typing queues multiple full-tree scans. Add Windows candidates ('where rg', scoop/cargo paths) + a generation check or cancellation token.

defects.title: Disabled palette commands silently no-op; CommandResult errors and the danger flag are never surfaced
defects.detail: commandToPaletteCommand discards runCommand's {ok:false,error} — e.g. 'show all panes' at zero panes closes the palette and does nothing — and danger:'external' (appCommands.ts:218) never reaches the row since Command has no danger field. Filter/visually-disable !enabled entries and thread danger + failure toasts through. Related: the DP matcher has no title-length/state cap (CommandPalette.tsx:87-106; FileFinder calls it 2x per file for up to 20k files), and the MRU 'recent' group can be one-run stale on reopen (loadMru read inside a memo whose deps miss it, 235/269).

defects.title: Unlayered transition baseline overrides Tailwind utilities; .press/.lift/.btn-glow shorthand cancels color easing
defects.detail: Two structural motion defects: (1) the global baseline is unlayered author CSS, beating Tailwind's @layer utilities regardless of specificity — transition-opacity/transition-all on interactive elements is silently dead (e.g. ChatPane.tsx:3181-3187 hover-reveal now hard-snaps); (2) .press/.lift/.btn-glow set the transition SHORTHAND (transform only), resetting transition-property and killing the color baseline they claim to pair with (App.css:261-280). Move the baseline into @layer components and use longhands (or include color/border/shadow in the utility lists). Fix BEFORE adopting the motion utilities widely.

defects.title: Settings dead chrome: four unconsumed controls, dead github/docs buttons, hardcoded version, 'macos' copy
defects.detail: Merged: defaultSocketName/autoRefreshSeconds/showNonOsaiSessions/graphPhysicsStrength have zero consumers (OracleRoster polls a hardcoded 5000ms and always shows non-osai sessions); 'github'/'docs' buttons have no onClick (1515-1520); version is hardcoded 'v0.1.0' while diagInfo() returns the real app_version (719-721); 'native alerts' sub says 'macos notifications outside the shell' on Windows (1395, isApple already imported) and AppearancePreview draws macOS traffic-light dots (515-517). Also: the redundant boot-time appearance effect at 1020-1026 duplicates App.tsx's applyAppearance — delete it.

defects.title: Hover-only action rows are invisible to keyboard focus across the transcript
defects.detail: Copy/edit/regenerate on UserBubble, the assistant copy row (4627), ActivityStep open-in-pane (4027), FileCard cluster (4326), and image-chip remove (3184) all use opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 with no group-focus-within reveal — tab focus lands on fully invisible controls. Add focus-within reveal to each group.

defects.title: Whisper endpoint hardcoded to localhost:9000 — dictation always fails only AFTER the user records
defects.detail: WHISPER_URL is a frozen literal with no Settings entry, no pre-flight, no Windows provisioning story: the user clicks the mic, speaks, waits, then gets 'is the whisper server running on :9000?'. Pre-flight on first mic interaction, disable/explain affordances when absent, make the URL a setting.

defects.title: Honest-state gaps in secondary panes: blank PulsePane, lying error/empty states
defects.detail: Merged: PulsePane renders permanently blank on slow/failed fetch (no skeleton/error, failures only reportDiag); PluginsPane misreports backend failure as '0 skills · no skills match' (PluginsPane.tsx:17-19); FilesPane project picker shows fake 'scanning…' forever on empty/failed listProjects (FilesPane.tsx:259-263,346); BridgesPane disconnected copy promises 'press connect to turn it back on' while the button is a 'not wired yet' toast (BridgesPane.tsx:416-419). Each needs a real loading/empty/error triple.

defects.title: Destructive/permission affordances off-pattern: window.confirm agent removal, undisclosed --dangerously-skip-permissions
defects.detail: Merged: AgentRow removal uses the blocking native confirm() (the P0 roadmap already purged window.prompt for the same reason) — replace with the in-place two-click pattern; and CreateOracleForm's checkbox labeled only 'launch claude on start' hardcodes 'claude --dangerously-skip-permissions' (OracleRoster.tsx:242,647) — disclose the flag and derive the engine from the detected provider.

defects.title: AppCast picked window never persists; mirror/attach panes leak smaller defects
defects.detail: Merged superapp mediums: App.tsx passes neither onWindowChange nor onNotify to AppCastPane, so a picked cast window is lost on layout restore and the notify branch is dead (AppCastPane.tsx:77,108); AttachAppsPane.focus() has no catch — failures are silent unhandled rejections (46-53); mac_capture_app screenshots the ENTIRE screen, not the target window (mac_apps.rs:124-128, privacy-leaky); accent sits on 'capture' instead of the primary 'focus' verb (AppAttachPane.tsx:105-124); MirrorViewer keeps the off-scale 26px heading + dead-end 'pixel streaming' note (118,136-138); BrowserPane's reload is titled 'Stop' while loading but always reloads (1132-1137) and 'Reveal in Finder' is hardcoded on Windows (1325).

defects.title: Mission Control: clicking empty gallery space doesn't close; card close-X is a span
defects.detail: The gallery container stopPropagation's mousedown so the documented click-scrim close only works in the thin top bar, and the per-card close is a <span onMouseDown> — keyboard-unreachable. Move stopPropagation to the inner flex-wrap div, make the X a button. Related cheap fix: Ctrl+` and the menu 'overview' still silently no-op at 0 panes (1448, 2563) — add a flash('no open panes').

defects.title: NotesPane advertises Ctrl+N 'new note within pane' but the chord is globally bound to new-terminal
defects.detail: The + button title promises chord('N') 'within pane', but NotesPane registers no handler and App.tsx:1429 binds mod+N globally with preventDefault to spawn a terminal — the advertised shortcut opens a terminal over your notes. Add a focused-pane-aware handler or drop the claim. Related: the Settings cheat-sheet lists 6 of ~18 live bindings (Settings.tsx:625-630) and the unread hotkeys metadata diverges from the real switch.

defects.title: Existing users never migrated off flashLevel 'lush'
defects.detail: DEFAULT_SETTINGS is calm, but saveSettings persists the full merged object, so any install that saved under the old lush default carries flashLevel:'lush' forever; migrations exist for onboardingComplete and topBarMode but not flashLevel (135-146). Add the equivalent back-fill — the 'existing users' half of the P0 item.

defects.title: Settings close X stacks on top of embedded pane refresh buttons
defects.detail: Verified, downgraded (panes auto-fetch on mount/poll, worst case is a recoverable accidental modal close): the absolute right-3 top-3 z-10 close X geometrically covers BridgesPane/PluginsPane's header refresh buttons when those sections render full-bleed (1090-1097 vs BridgesPane.tsx:209-215, PluginsPane.tsx:56-62) — a refresh-aimed click closes Settings. Inset the embedded pane or move the X.

remainingWork.title: Windows path-correctness sweep (one shared helper + backend normalization)
remainingWork.why: Single root cause behind 6 confirmed-high breakages: file finder ranking/recents, files-pane git decorations and 'open terminal here', transcript labels/clickability, revealFile/finderRoot, browser file-drop and open-folder, composer chips/quoting. Highest-leverage fix in the whole inventory.
remainingWork.scope: New basename/dirname/normalize/quote helpers in src/lib (copy chatPaneState.ts:81-84's split(/[\\/]/)); sweep call sites in paneOpenActions.ts, paneRouting.ts, appCommands.ts, FileFinder.tsx, FilesPane.tsx, ChatPane.tsx, BrowserPane.tsx, TerminalComposer.tsx, EditorPane.tsx, App.tsx; normalize emitted paths in src-tauri/src/files.rs (read_dir_tree, git_status, find_files, home_dir). ~10 files, 1-2 sessions.

remainingWork.title: Money-agents platform rebase + firaz scrub
remainingWork.why: Two confirmed-high defects (stranger's macOS home baked into every created agent; id 'firaz' force-reported running into the home StatusFooter) make the feature non-functional and identity-leaky on the shipping platform.
remainingWork.scope: src/lib/moneyAgents.ts (~150 lines): runtime home via invoke('home_dir') with platform separators + log dirs, gate the firaz branch on state-file existence, replace firaz/AGENT_CHAT_MODEL seed copy with displayName()/agentChatModelId(); touch MoneyAgentsSection.tsx (inline confirm instead of window.confirm).

remainingWork.title: Wire text-size + density for real
remainingWork.why: Confirmed-high: two advertised, persisted Settings controls do nothing while the preview pretends they work; also closes the inert two-thirds of the P0 fluidity baseline.
remainingWork.scope: App.css ([data-density='compact'] overrides + var(--app-font-scale) consumers on the text tokens); TerminalRuntime.tsx + EditorPane.tsx (subscribe terminalFontSize → xterm/Monaco fontSize); settings.ts (fold density into AppSettings); delete the duplicate boot effect in Settings.tsx:1020. ~5 files, half a session.

remainingWork.title: Native-webview occlusion pass
remainingWork.why: Three confirmed-high/medium defects from one compositing rule: invisible FileFinder/GlobalSearch/close-prompt, invisible address-bar autocomplete, occluded browser toasts/annotate badge and the trust-critical AppCast mirroring indicator.
remainingWork.scope: App.tsx:632 (extend overlayOpen with fileFinderOpen/globalSearchOpen/closePrompt/splash/onboardingOpen); BrowserPane.tsx:308 (add suggestOpen) + relocate toast/badge into toolbar chrome; AppCastPane.tsx (badge into toolbar row). ~3 files, small.

remainingWork.title: Windows terminal correctness: pty cwd + paste binding
remainingWork.why: Confirmed-high: every Windows shell silently opens in the home dir while the UI claims otherwise; Ctrl+V sends a literal ^V into TUIs.
remainingWork.scope: src-tauri/src/pty.rs (add cwd: Option<String> to the Windows command, honor it); TerminalRuntime.tsx:278-299,443 (isApple-gated Ctrl+V/Ctrl+Shift+V paste incl. clipboard-image path; pass cwd in the spawnShell fallback). 2 files.

remainingWork.title: Chat failure-truth completion (P1 finish)
remainingWork.why: The P1-critical failure-distinction item is still void for codex/opencode, claude's error text is dropped, retry is a dead click in two states, and user-stop paints a failure card — the safety story is half-true.
remainingWork.scope: src-tauri/src/chat.rs (is_error:true + message on all synthesized failure lines incl. the opencode EOF 'success' path; skip/flag the stop fan_out); ChatPane.tsx (read ev.result, route startup-failure retry to restartKey, pass bubble text to regenerate, stopping flag); runEvents.ts (subtype check). ~3 files.

remainingWork.title: Empty-hero rescue (plan §4 critical + cohesion fixes)
remainingWork.why: The plan's single critical §4 item is untouched: telemetry floods the first-run surface, and Enter during startup tears the hero into a one-footnote transcript. The same pass cheaply lands the hero's entrance fade, anchored layout, .surface-pop/.hero-title/.helper-line adoption, the ⏎ submit cue, and the shared docked helper line.
remainingWork.scope: ChatPane.tsx only (~100 lines): gate chips/ledger on !empty||hasDraft, keep empty=true pre-session with an inline status/error line, fix queue-flush deps, justify-start + fade-in-up, swap the bespoke shell for surface-pop/focus-accent, use usageLabel in the helper, render the helper when docked.

remainingWork.title: Quick safety/correctness batch
remainingWork.why: Cheap, high-trust fixes: data-loss (one-click note delete), misleading destructive affordances, replay clobbering settings, dead chrome.
remainingWork.scope: NotesPane.tsx (two-click delete confirm, ~20 lines); Onboarding.tsx (guard auto-pick + conditional chatModel wipe, ~15 lines); OracleRoster.tsx (disclose/derive the bypass flag); Settings.tsx (wire or remove 4 dead controls, real version from diagInfo, opener-wired github/docs, platform-aware notifications copy); settings.ts (flashLevel lush back-fill); TerminalComposer.tsx:1164 (chord('J')); MOD-MOD label separator.

remainingWork.title: Gate cast/attach on platform + honest empty states
remainingWork.why: Confirmed-high: two palette-reachable apps are broken dead-ends on Windows rendering raw Rust/OS errors every 10s under macOS copy.
remainingWork.scope: apps.ts + appCommands.ts (isApple gate or capability flag); AppCastPane.tsx + AttachAppsPane.tsx ('not available on Windows yet' empty state, catch on focus()); optionally cfg-gate mac_list_apps in mac_apps.rs. Small.

remainingWork.title: Scope the three over-broad window key handlers
remainingWork.why: Each produces surprising cross-pane behavior: Enter anywhere restarts exited terminals and eats composer sends; Ctrl+S double-saves into a false conflict banner across all editor panes; printable keys duplicate into multiple composers.
remainingWork.scope: TerminalRuntime.tsx:545-555 (scope to pane host/activeElement); EditorPane.tsx:169-194 (single save path, in-flight guard, focused-pane check); TerminalComposer.tsx:280-331 (gate on focused/visible pane). 3 files.

remainingWork.title: Base-provider sweep completion
remainingWork.why: Closes the P1 base-sweep remainder: hardcoded spark launcher with sandbox bypass, defaultAi drift, stale-model fallback to codex.
remainingWork.scope: App.tsx:1389-1396 + apps.ts:68 (route through baseModelId/baseProvider); ChatPane.tsx:812 (firstModelForEngine fallback) + composer picker writes defaultAiForProvider; moneyAgents.ts:60 seed model line; update bundleBoundaries.test.ts:300 pin.

remainingWork.title: Modal a11y + focus-trap pass
remainingWork.why: Six overlays declare or imply modality without delivering it; two of three discovery overlays are invisible to screen readers; hover-only rows are invisible to keyboard focus. One shared utility fixes the class.
remainingWork.scope: Shared trap hook + ARIA mirror: Settings.tsx, Onboarding.tsx, CommandPalette.tsx (trap only), FileFinder.tsx, GlobalSearch.tsx (full ARIA mirror + Tab handling), ChatPane.tsx GoalEditorOverlay; group-focus-within reveals on ~5 transcript hover rows. ~7 files, one session.

remainingWork.title: P0 dead-code deletion batch
remainingWork.why: The only fully-open P0 (homescreen surface): dead bento CSS, unread hotkeys metadata, write-only reportUsage loop — plus dead modules the audits found (controlCenter.ts, idleFocus, IdleDashboard's six unused props).
remainingWork.scope: App.css:390-488; commands.ts/appCommands.ts hotkeys field; diag.ts:163-182 + call sites; delete src/lib/controlCenter.ts + its test; dashboard.ts idleFocus; prune IdleDashboard.tsx props + App.tsx wiring. Pure deletion, ~250 lines.

remainingWork.title: Homescreen P1 completion
remainingWork.why: Half-landed P1: command line off-token, silent about provider, never focused; glance pops in shifting the centered hero; greeting knows nothing about the day; the seeded chat is still 'jarvis'.
remainingWork.scope: IdleControlCenter.tsx (surface-pop shadow, provider helper line from settings, focus-on-mount or type-to-focus, consume UsageGlance's loaded flag with a min-height shimmer, day-aware greeting clause, dirty-count button, platform-correct projects empty state); App.tsx:1969 + IdleDashboard prop rename (jarvis → provider/chat).

remainingWork.title: Palette/discovery completion
remainingWork.why: Remaining P1 gaps degrade trust in the flagship surfaces: silent no-op commands, unmarked danger, staleness, an uncapped matcher, slow Windows search, and a dead appshot chord.
remainingWork.scope: commands.ts/CommandPalette.tsx (disabled styling + failure toast + danger marker, matcher length/state cap, mruVersion bump, clamped Page jumps, deep-search row in no-results); files.rs ripgrep Windows candidates + scan generation check; Settings cheat-sheet generated from the real keymap; appshot: Ctrl-double-tap binding + honest Windows gating (backend is macOS-only).

remainingWork.title: Design-system adoption sweep + lint guard (P2)
remainingWork.why: All primitives exist with zero adoption; without the lint guard the 55 remaining literals and 7 divergent headers will keep drifting.
remainingWork.scope: Convert headers in FilesPane/NotesPane/PluginsPane/BridgesPane/MoneyAgentsPane/FileViewerPane/PulsePane to .pane-header; tokenize GIT_COLOR/scrims/shadows/text-white→--color-accent-fg; build PaneEmpty/Skeleton/CopyButton/toast/uiHooks and wire honest loading/empty/error states (PulsePane, PluginsPane, FilesPane picker, BridgesPane copy); add a lintTokens test banning text-white/bg-black/literal-hex in src/components. 1-2 sessions.

remainingWork.title: Motion choreography wave 1 (fix substrate defects first, then adopt)
remainingWork.why: The P0 substrate landed but two structural defects (unlayered baseline killing Tailwind transitions; shorthand utilities cancelling color easing) must be fixed before adoption, after which each entrance is a one-line className.
remainingWork.scope: App.css (move baseline into @layer, longhand transitions in .press/.lift/.btn-glow, author §2.4 .overlay-backdrop/.toast-in/out/.disclose/.skeleton, hoist osai-wave keyframe, retune the ~9 hardcoded duration literals, reduce-motion transform:none companions); adopt .scale-in on composer Dropdown + palette backdrop, .fade-in-up on pane mount/toasts; splash unmount on transitionend.

remainingWork.title: Interactive-surfaces P2 + remaining chat affordances
remainingWork.why: Rounds out the still-mostly-open P2s: frozen xterm/Monaco themes ignore theme/accent, voice gives no recording feedback, loading states pop, and the transcript lacks find/copy/timestamps completions.
remainingWork.scope: TerminalRuntime.tsx + monaco.ts (derive themes from computed tokens/accent); voice.ts/VoiceButton.tsx (AnalyserNode waveform, whisper URL setting + pre-flight); EditorPane/TerminalPane skeletons; PetPane.tsx:277 charming status (+ accent-driven glow, lazy ticker); ChatPane.tsx (CopyButton on Write preview/DiffBlock, assistant createdAt + render, Cmd/Ctrl-F find-in-chat with mounted collapsed blocks, approval verdict echo).

remainingWork.title: P3 feasible signature features: hero starter chips + AccountMenu live status
remainingWork.why: Only after broken/partial work: the empty hero's discovery story still ends at a blank box, and the AccountMenu subtitle is dead chrome — both plan-sanctioned, small, and high-visibility.
remainingWork.scope: ChatPane.tsx (quiet starter-chip row + surfaced attach/dictate/resume on the empty hero); AccountMenu.tsx:132 (computed base-provider name + live status dot, optional quick-switcher). ~2 files.
